LanguageData.Shell_82mmMortar_HE.label: 82mm mortar shell (HE)
LanguageData.Shell_82mmMortar_HE.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.

LanguageData.Shell_82mmMortar_Firefoam.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.

LanguageData.Shell_82mmMortar_Smoke.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
